metadata.title: Tier 2 plugin-qa sub-rubric
metadata.description: QA-review rules calibrated for Claude Code plugin projects. Activates only when project-config.yaml declares project_kind: claude-code-plugin. Layer 2 (sub-rubric) of the four-layer rubric composition (base + sub + regime + project) per ADR-079 + ADR-088. Owns the plugin-specific lint hand-offs (markdown, yaml, JSON-schema) and the CHANGELOG.md enforcement rule that requires every component contract change to ship with a corresponding CHANGELOG entry. Lint hand-offs delegate enforcement to the markdownlint, yamllint, and jsonschema adapters (E77-S13) when declared in project-config.yaml `tool_adapters:`; absent adapters degrade to advisory findings via the tri-state tool-availability probe (ADR-089).

markdown.description: Markdown lint hand-off — runs the markdownlint adapter (E77-S13) over plugin docs and SKILL.md files. When the adapter is absent from tool_adapters, the rule degrades to an advisory pointing at the upgrade path.

yaml.description: YAML lint hand-off — runs the yamllint adapter (E77-S13) over manifest.yaml, project-config.yaml, and any frontmatter blocks reachable from the plugin tree.

jsonschema.description: JSON-Schema validation hand-off — runs the jsonschema adapter (E77-S13) against rubric files, adapter.json descriptors, and manifest.json files. Catches schema violations missed by ad-hoc parsers.

changelog_enforcement.description: Per FR-417 — every change to a plugin component contract (skill SKILL.md frontmatter, adapter.json, manifest.yaml, schema files) MUST ship with a corresponding entry in CHANGELOG.md. The check is detected by inspecting the staged diff: when a tracked contract file changes and CHANGELOG.md is unchanged in the same commit/PR, the rule fires WARNING-class (Medium).

severity_rules.pattern: Plugin tree contains markdown files (SKILL.md, README.md, docs under plugins/<name>/) and the markdownlint adapter is declared in project-config.yaml `tool_adapters:`. The plugin-qa rubric delegates lint enforcement to the adapter via the tri-state probe (ADR-089). When the adapter is absent (omitted or null), the rule degrades to an Info-class advisory pointing at the markdownlint adapter (E77-S13) as the upgrade path.
severity_rules.description: Markdown lint hand-off — plugin docs and SKILL.md files MUST pass markdownlint when the adapter is available. Failure to lint clean is a WARNING-class finding (Medium severity) per FR-417. Authors should run the adapter locally before merge.
severity_rules.remediation: Install the markdownlint adapter (E77-S13) and declare it under `tool_adapters:` in project-config.yaml. Run the adapter over the plugin tree and fix any reported violations.

severity_rules.pattern: Plugin tree contains YAML files (manifest.yaml, project-config.yaml, frontmatter blocks in SKILL.md / story files) and the yamllint adapter is declared in project-config.yaml `tool_adapters:`. The plugin-qa rubric delegates lint enforcement to the adapter via the tri-state probe (ADR-089).
severity_rules.description: YAML lint hand-off — plugin manifest, project-config, and frontmatter blocks MUST pass yamllint when the adapter is available. Failure to lint clean is a WARNING-class finding (Medium severity) per FR-417.
severity_rules.remediation: Install the yamllint adapter (E77-S13) and declare it under `tool_adapters:` in project-config.yaml. Fix any reported indentation, key-duplicate, or trailing-whitespace violations.

severity_rules.pattern: Plugin tree contains JSON files governed by a JSON Schema (rubric files under rubrics/, adapter.json descriptors under scripts/adapters/, manifest.json) and the jsonschema adapter is declared in project-config.yaml `tool_adapters:`. The plugin-qa rubric delegates schema validation to the adapter via the tri-state probe (ADR-089).
severity_rules.description: JSON-Schema validation hand-off — every JSON file with a governing schema MUST pass schema validation when the adapter is available. Failure is a WARNING-class finding (Medium severity) per FR-417. Schema-validation discipline catches structural violations that ad-hoc parsers miss.
severity_rules.remediation: Install the jsonschema adapter (E77-S13) and declare it under `tool_adapters:` in project-config.yaml. Fix any reported schema violations against the matching `$schema` URL.

severity_rules.pattern: A plugin component contract file changed in the staged diff (SKILL.md frontmatter, adapter.json, manifest.yaml, schemas/*.json) AND CHANGELOG.md is unchanged in the same commit / PR. The rule inspects the diff for tracked contract paths and confirms a corresponding CHANGELOG.md entry exists.
severity_rules.description: Per FR-417, every component contract change MUST ship with a CHANGELOG entry under the appropriate Keep-a-Changelog section. Missing CHANGELOG entries break downstream consumers and erase the audit trail. WARNING-class finding (Medium severity).
severity_rules.remediation: Add a CHANGELOG.md entry describing the contract change. Use the Keep-a-Changelog format (Added / Changed / Fixed / Deprecated / Removed / Security) and reference the story key.
